evidence_summary: VN-09 flags يَشْتَهُونَ as finite imperfect plural verb metadata, not dictionary-infinitive prose.
VN-09 keeps وَضَاقَتْ as component-only wāw plus finite feminine verb evidence below whole-token certification.
VN-09 keeps لِتُضَيِّقُوا۟ as component-only lām plus finite verb evidence requiring function and mood review.
VN-09 flags يَعْصِمُكَ as a finite verb whose attached كَ object suffix must be visible.
VN-09 flags يَجْتَبِيكَ as a finite verb whose attached كَ object suffix must be visible.
VN-09 keeps وَفَدَيْنَٰهُ as component-only wāw plus finite verb plus suffix evidence below whole-token certification.
VN-09 flags أَقْوَٰتَهَا as a nominal row whose attached هَا suffix must be visible.
VN-09 keeps كَلَمْحِ as component-only kāf/comparison plus host evidence below whole-token certification.
VN-09 flags لِمَا as lām plus mā function and attachment review, not a flat surface-family gloss.
VN-09 flags لَّمَّا as a function collision requiring exact negative, exceptive, or temporal construction review.
VN-09 keeps لَأَوَّٰهٌ as component-only lexical-host evidence with prefix/function risk.
VN-09 flags تَفَثَهُمْ as a suffix-bearing nominal row whose attached هُمْ suffix must be visible.
